scheduledJobs.description: Triggers workflow bookings.expire-stale-holds from graph schedule @voyant-travel/bookings#schedule.bookings.expire-stale-holds.every-5-minutes.
Triggers workflow notifications.send-due-reminders from graph schedule @voyant-travel/notifications#schedule.notifications.send-due-reminders.hourly.
Emits promotion.changed at valid_from / valid_until boundaries (every 5 min).

env.description: Primary Postgres connection URL used by migrations and fallback DB clients.
env.name: DATABASE_URL

env.description: Direct Postgres URL for the resident Node pool.
env.name: DATABASE_URL_DIRECT

env.description: Comma-separated read replica URLs for the HTTP data plane.
env.name: DATABASE_URL_REPLICAS
